description_long: This object is a lush, leafy potted plant with broad, deeply lobed green leaves that have distinctive natural holes and splits, characteristic of the Monstera genus. The leaves are arranged on several long, slender stems that radiate outward from a central base, giving the plant a full and slightly sprawling appearance. The foliage displays a rich, vibrant green color with subtle variations in shading, adding to its realistic and healthy look. The plant appears to be mature, with some leaves arching gracefully while others stand more upright, creating a dynamic and natural form. No pot or container is visible in the images, suggesting the focus is solely on the plant itself. There are no visible decorative elements, labels, or additional accessories attached to the plant.
description: A vibrant Monstera plant with large, split green leaves on long, arching stems. The foliage is lush and natural, with no visible pot or decorations.
description_view_0: This view highlights the top and front of the plant, showing the overlapping, fenestrated leaves and their lush, layered arrangement.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the vertical spread of the stems and the arching uppermost leaf, revealing the plant's height and fullness.
description_view_2: The back view displays the radiating stems and the undersides of several leaves, showing the plant's structure and leaf attachment points.
description_view_3: This angled view showcases the plant's depth, with several leaves overlapping and the tallest leaf arching forward, giving a sense of three-dimensionality.
